sentences.arabic: الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ تِقْنِيَّةٌ حَدِيثَةٌ تُغَيِّرُ الْعَالَمَ الْآنَ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija je moderna tehnologija koja sada mijenja svijet.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is a modern technology that is changing the world now.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يُسَاعِدُ الْحَوَاسِيبَ عَلَى التَّفْكِيرِ وَالتَّعَلُّمِ مِثْلَ الْبَشَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ona pomaže računarima da razmišljaju i uče poput ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: It helps computers think and learn like humans.

sentences.arabic: نَجِدُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةَ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ الذَّكِيَّةِ الَّتِي نَسْتَخْدِمُهَا.
sentences.translation: Ovu tehnologiju nalazimo u mnogim pametnim aplikacijama koje koristimo.
sentences.translationEn: We find this technology in many smart applications that we use.
